## Leather Protection Kit
Q²M Leather Set Strong is the comprehensive solution that includes Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong, a potent pre-coating leather cleaner, and Q² LeatherCoat, creating the perfect combination for leather maintenance and protection. Q²M Leather Strong effectively removes deep dirt and oil residue, providing optimal preparation for coating. Q² LeatherCoat ensures a durable matte clean surface, facilitating easier future maintenance against contamination
BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat 120ml / Q²M LeatherBrush / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfiber

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-coat_4abe6e92-1509-468d-822a-a6bd153f577a.jpg?v=1702511106&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong_3b51e21c-339c-452a-aadd-072c87f01784.jpg?v=1702511106&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong-banner1.jpg?v=1702511106&width=2400)

Safe deep clean
Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong stands as the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for the application of a quartz coating. Free from softening additives and residue, it ensures no interference with the quality of the coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner provides a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-glass-cleaner.jpg?v=1702511327&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q2m-glass-500ml)

## Streak Free
With GYEON Glass, you're guaranteed a streak-free finish. *Just don't using paper towels with it!*

## Detailer helpers
You can't go anywhere without proper quality towels!

[
Shop GYEON Interior Pack
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q2m-interior-pack-evo)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-strong-banner2.jpg?v=1702511106&width=2400)

All in one solution
This complete set includes the new Q²M LeatherBrush, Q²M MF Applicator, MF Towel, and the innovative foam dispenser, ensuring more effective and easier application right out of the box. Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong removes dirt, oily residue, and provides optimal preparation for coating. Meanwhile, Q²M LeatherCoat ensures a long-lasting protective effect, simplifying future maintenance.

**Tip:** Don’t hesitate to use water in conjunction with the Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong foam. This aids in distributing the product and generating more foam. The included Q²M LeatherBrush effectively agitates the cleaner, removing dirt from the material's structure.

**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# 

## GYEON Leather Set Strong

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__06_Leaflet_InteriorSurfaceProtection_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

Q²M Leather Set Strong is the complete solution combining Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong, a powerful pre-coating leather cleaner and Q²M Leather Coat to achieve the ideal leather maintenance & protection solution. Q²M Leather Strong ensures the removal of deep dirt, oil residue and provides best preparation for coating. Q²M Leather Coat ensures a long lasting matte clean surface and makes future maintenance easier against contamination.

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LEATHERCLEANER STRONG 200ML / Q² LEATHERCOAT 120ML / Q²M LEATHERBRUSH / Q²M MF APPLICATOR / MICROFIBRE

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Don’t be afraid to use water along with the Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong foam. This will help you distribute the product and create more foam. The attached Q²M Leather Brush will agitate the cleaner and remove dirt from the structure of the material. TIP: Always use multiple microfibre towels. It’s worth to wipe the leather with a damp towel once cleaning is done.

CONSUMPTION: 1set / 2-3 cars

### ALL IN ONE

This full set comes with the brand new Q²M Leather Brush & Q²M MF Applicator as well as a MF Towel and the new foam dispenser, allowing more effective and easier application out of the box. Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong ensures the removal of dirt, oily residue and provides best preparation for coating. Q²M Leather Coat ensures a long lasting protective effect and makes future maintenance easier.

### STRONG AND EFFECTIVE

Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong is the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for application of a quartz coating. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality coating. Q²M Leather Cleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

What's the different between GYEON Leather Shield and Leather Coat?

Leather Shield is a full-on leather ceramic coating, whereas Leather Coat is a water-based protection spray that's easy to use and can be used to maintain and top up Leather Shield.

Is it shiny?

No, both Cleaner and Leather Coat will give you a factory OEM matte finish.

How long does it last?

Leather Coat will last round 3 months per coat.

Does it work on dashboards?

Yes, it does. Not limited to leather or soft-touch material, Leather Coat & Cleaner can be used to coat plastics and vinyl as well.

What's the difference between Mild and Strong?

Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.
